Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Hancock of Pacific Justice telephone number 415-310-1940 for Plaintiff Erika McCartney.
Renee Rothauge of Markowitz Herbold PC telephone number 503-880-8052 for Defendant Traeger Pellet Grills LLC.

Mr. Hancock explained how the fee allocation was made. Ms. Rothauge stated that she agrees that fees are reasonable. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Consent Judgment is granted. Order and separate consent judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
